name: Permian Wilds
description: You came to in a brutal landscape where ancient beasts still rule the land. There are no safe roads here, only dry basins, bone fields, and hungry predators.

name: Marshcast
description: You are stranded at the edge of a primordial wetland. The mud is thick, the eggs are fresh, and anything in the water can kill you.

name: Nest Raider
description: You pushed your luck one step too far and woke the brood. You begin near an active nesting ground, surrounded by hatchlings and the adults that defend them.

name: Last Expedition
description: Your survey team is gone, your supplies are ruined, and the valley around you belongs to ancient megafauna. You are the last thing left to hunt.
